purpose: Pre-restructure baseline of PM agent's finding count against PRD-review test fixtures. Used as the merge-gate threshold for the v0 restructure (PM persona agent → focused subagents).
agent_dispatched_note: Old name; session has pre-rename agents cached. Behavior is today's PM (unaffected by rename).
methodology: Each fixture dispatched once. PM graded its 9 assigned dims (1, 2, 3, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12). A 'finding' = an evaluation point with grade != A and grade != N/A (i.e., a real gap identified). See shield/scripts/capture-pm-baseline.sh for the capture script.

lean-with-gaps.na_reason: Lean PRD — dims 9, 10 informational per rubric lean-mode exemptions

internal-tool.na_reason: Internal-only engineering tool — dim 2 N/A per rubric scope-bounded exception; dims 8, 9, 10 N/A because no external users

gate_criteria.merge_blocking: new PM total findings >= 62 (the pm_total_findings above) AND no individual fixture regresses by more than 10%
